name: Dune
description: Frank Herbert's epic sci-fi saga — the desert planet Arrakis, spice, and the prophesied Kwisatz Haderach.

questions.q: Who wrote the original 1965 Dune novel?

source.notes: Serialized in Analog 1963-65; book published 1965.

questions.q: What is the official name of the desert planet at the heart of Dune?

source.notes: Also called Dune by its Fremen inhabitants.

questions.q: What is the name of the prized substance found only on Arrakis?

source.notes: Required for interstellar navigation and extends lifespan.

questions.q: Who plays Paul Atreides in Denis Villeneuve's 2021-2024 Dune films?

source.notes: Oscar-nominated young actor.

questions.q: Which two noble houses are at the center of the conflict in Dune?

source.notes: Orchestrated by the scheming Emperor.

questions.q: Who directed the 2021 film adaptation of Dune?

source.notes: Villeneuve had previously directed Arrival and Blade Runner 2049.

questions.q: What giant creature, native to Arrakis, is drawn by rhythmic movements on the sand?

source.notes: Produces spice as a byproduct of its lifecycle.

questions.q: Which all-female mystical order trained Lady Jessica?

source.notes: The Bene Gesserit breed for a messianic 'Kwisatz Haderach.'

questions.q: Who plays Paul's mother Lady Jessica in the 2021 film?

source.notes: Also stars in Mission: Impossible Fallout.

questions.q: Who plays Paul's father, Duke Leto Atreides?

source.notes: Isaac also stars in the Star Wars sequel trilogy.

questions.q: Which Swedish actor plays the obese, scheming Baron Vladimir Harkonnen?

source.notes: Extensive prosthetics for the role.

questions.q: What do the Fremen wear to survive the desert, recycling their body's moisture?

source.notes: Collect sweat and urine, filter them, and recycle as drinking water.

questions.q: Which planet does House Atreides rule before being moved to Arrakis?

source.notes: A water-rich world that contrasts with desert Arrakis.

questions.q: What is the term for the messianic superbeing the Bene Gesserit have been breeding for generations?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: replaced near-duplicate distractor 'Maud'Dib' with 'The Lisan al-Gaib'. Paul becomes the Kwisatz Haderach in the story.

questions.q: Which Fremen name do the desert people give Paul Atreides?

source.notes: 'Usul' is his tribe name, 'Muad'Dib' his war name.

questions.q: Who plays the Fremen warrior Chani opposite Paul in Villeneuve's films?

source.notes: Zendaya also plays MJ in the MCU Spider-Man films.

questions.q: Which weapon system do the Atreides and Harkonnens rely on for personal combat, making it a duelist's culture?

source.notes: Personal shields cause nuclear reactions when hit by lasers, so combat favors slow blades.

questions.q: Who plays Fremen leader Stilgar in the 2021-2024 films?

source.notes: Oscar-winning actor from No Country for Old Men.

questions.q: Which 1984 cult-film director made the first major Dune adaptation — a notorious commercial flop?

source.notes: Lynch has largely disowned the cut.

questions.q: Which Chilean-French director famously tried — and failed — to adapt Dune in the 1970s, with a planned cast including Dalí and Mick Jagger?

source.notes: Subject of the documentary 'Jodorowsky's Dune' (2013).

questions.q: Which composer scored Villeneuve's Dune Part One (winning an Oscar) and Dune Part Two?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: clarified Zimmer's Oscar was for Dune Part One only; Part Two score was disqualified by AMPAS rules. Zimmer turned down Tenet to score Dune.

questions.q: In what year was Frank Herbert's sequel novel 'Dune Messiah' published?

source.notes: Followed by Children of Dune (1976), God Emperor (1981), Heretics (1984), and Chapterhouse (1985).
